hooks.command: cp_line=$(grep -m1 '^## CP-' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/docs/claude/checkpoints/CHECKPOINT_LOG.md" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [ -z "$cp_line" ] && exit 0; cp_id=$(echo "$cp_line" | grep -oE 'CP-[0-9-]+' | head -1); title=$(echo "$cp_line" | sed 's/^## CP-[0-9-]* — //'); cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/notify_session.py session --checkpoint "$cp_id" --summary "$title" 2>/dev/null || true
